message:
Sync gh-aw workflows from llm-d-infra (a566d16) (#770)

Updated workflows:
  - upstream-monitor.md + upstream-monitor.lock.yml
  - link-checker.md + link-checker.lock.yml
  - typo-checker.md + typo-checker.lock.yml

Source: https://github.com/llm-d/llm-d-infra/commit/a566d16d046257f193d1c4ee5d88ca805145cb69

Signed-off-by: llm-d-infra-sync <llm-d-infra-sync@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: llm-d-infra-sync <llm-d-infra-sync@users.noreply.github.com>
